Chrysopogon zizanioides, commonly known as Vetiver grass, is a type of tropical grass with medicinal properties. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Chrysopogon zizanioides include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
